name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL2ND_ITEM
description: Item component for 2nd depth picker. Shows text with selection-based color transition (white when selected, gray when not). 40px LGSBD23 font, centered in cell. 300ms color transition for smooth selection changes.
visualForm: Centered text item with smooth color transition between white (selected) and gray (#cdcdcd) states, 40px font
descriptionKo: 2차 깊이 피커의 개별 항목 컴포넌트입니다. 선택 시 흰색, 미선택 시 회색으로 300ms 색상 전환 애니메이션이 적용됩니다. 40px LGSBD23 폰트를 사용합니다.
descriptionEn: Item component for 2nd depth picker. Shows text with selection-based color transition (white when selected, gray when not). 40px LGSBD23 font, centered in cell. 300ms color transition for smooth selection changes.
